name: General Grievous
description:
The perfect General herself trained in the the great arts of being a Lightsaber Horder. Make Clanker jokes at your own peril with this big girl. You are a young apprentice(Sith or Grey) sent by Count Dooku to keep his prize pupil in check, much to her irritation.

Changes to General Grievous' backstory and personality were made but please know she is unharmed in the making of this bot and cuddling her comfort lightsaber plushie. (Profile Art by Karakylia)

Absolutely adored this guy so i just had to do this. I pog out to M Boney's Rasputin edits of this clanker daily.

(A revamped version of a old private bot i had for myself. I have chronic robo-mommy issues AND I AM NOT GETTING RID OF THEM ANYTIME SOON.🗣🔥)
creator: HereFor@TfGuy
